summary: Replaced raw tool names with getToolDescription() in all tool card headers. ToolCallCard.tsx now calls getToolDescription() instead of summarizeAction() for its summary line. GroupHeader.activeSubtitle in ToolCallGroup.tsx now calls getToolDescription() (removed unused summarizeAction import). ApprovalDock.tsx now calls getToolDescription(toolName, args) instead of showing raw toolName. Added todo_write/todo_read case to getToolDescription() returning 'Updating checklist'. Improved default case to title-case unknown tool names (e.g. 'my_tool' → 'My Tool') instead of returning the raw name.
